task_completion.description: Open the Android System Settings application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Android Settings app is visible on the screen, showing standard system settings categories like 'Apps', 'Network & internet', etc.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the App Info screen for Flight Crew View.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'App info' screen specifically for 'Flight Crew View' is displayed within the Settings app.

task_completion.description: Access the Storage settings for the Flight Crew View app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Storage & cache' (or 'Storage') screen for Flight Crew View is visible, showing options to clear storage/data.

task_completion.description: Clear the app storage (data) for Flight Crew View.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation dialog for clearing app data is visible, or the 'User data' size is shown as 0 B, indicating the storage has been cleared.

task_completion.description: Reopen the Flight Crew View application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Flight Crew View app is launched and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the app has been reset to its factory state by checking for the Welcome/Login screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Flight Crew View app displays pre-authentication elements like 'LOG IN', 'Welcome', or 'Let's', and does NOT show the 'Friends' page.

integrity.description: The agent must use the Android GUI to clear the app data, not terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal emulator (like Termux) open executing commands like 'pm clear com.robert.fcView'.

integrity.description: The agent must not uninstall the Flight Crew View application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The app should remain installed on the device, evidenced by the ability to reopen it at the end of the trajectory. There should be no 'Uninstall finished' messages or the agent clicking 'Uninstall'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Android Settings and Flight Crew View apps.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show genuine Android OS UI elements and the actual app interface, not a web browser searching for the app or a text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target app is 'Flight Crew View' (package: com.robert.fcView). The Android Settings app must be used to clear data. A successful reset is confirmed when the reopened app displays pre-authentication text such as 'LOG IN', 'CREATE ACCOUNT', 'Let's', or 'Welcome'. The app must NOT display authenticated home screen text such as 'Friends', 'Add New Friend', or 'crewmember'.
